snippet: The National Student Wellbeing Program (NSWP) is an Australian Government program. From 1 January 2023, all Victorian schools participating in the NSWP can: Schools with the following campus types are eligible for NSWP funding at a campus level: Funding may be calculated at the Indicative, Confirmed and Revised cycles. Funding is allocated through cash funding. Eligible school campuses receive funding of $20,280 per year or $24,336 for schools in remote/very remote areas.
